impacts.statement: Expect major flooding of several thousands of acres of pastures and woods.
Expect flooded boatramps and several hundreds of acres of pastures. Move livestock and equipment to higher ground.
Minor lowland flooding of pastures and boatramps.  Move livestock and equipment to higher ground.
Minor lowland flooding.  Move livestock and equipment to higher ground.

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
